conditions.name: Rotator Cuff Injury
conditions.explanation: Common cause of shoulder pain from overuse or injury.

conditions.name: Frozen Shoulder
conditions.explanation: Stiffness and pain restricting shoulder movement.

data.action: Consider seeing a GP for assessment and guidance on treatment options.
home_tips: Rest the shoulder and avoid overhead activities.
Apply ice for 15-20 minutes to reduce swelling.
warning_signs: Severe pain not relieved by rest.
data.disclaimer: This is AI information only, not medical advice. For emergencies call 115.
